name: Helm Agent Eval Set
description: Golden eval cases for the Helm agent trace samples.

parts.text:
There are two Helm releases installed in the cluster:

1. Release name: kagent
   - Namespace: kagent
   - Revision: 2
   - Status: deployed
   - Chart: kagent-0.7.14

2. Release name: kagent-crds
   - Namespace: kagent
   - Revision: 1
   - Status: deployed
   - Chart: kagent-crds-0.7.14
